violations.description: Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Equipment that dispenses liquid/food/ice in unpackaged form was not cleaned properly and/or as frequently as required. -There is build up on the food contact surface of the ice machine.--Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned adequately. -The shelf in which the microwave sits on has dried food product present. It should be cleaned more frequently.
Toilet facilities. — --Toilet room was not provided with sufficient mechanical ventilation. -Both the single unisex and men's bathroom do not have working ventilation.
Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not maintained in good repair. -Tiles in the kitchen are cracking.

Cooling of potentially hazardous food. — --Cooling of potentially hazardous food was not accomplished using proper methods. -Discovered a prime rib roast in the 2 door middle upright cooler that was in a zip lock bag, dated 4/9 and had condensation in the bag and internal temperatures ranged between 47-51 degrees F. The cooling unit was evaluated and was operating properly. The roast was cooked 3 days prior to the inspection and after investigation it was determined that the cooling process will need to be evaluated.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not maintained in good repair.v -Floors in food prep area are missing tiles. This is an ongoing finding.
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Clean clothes, hair restraints, fingernail maint., jewelry, eating/drinking (1 pt deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (1 pt deducted)
Clean, maintained, tissue, vented, self-closing door (1 pt deducted)
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
